heading: Behavior
body:
Atlas Stream Processing supports only one [Stream Processor Windows](atlas-sp-windows)
stage per pipeline.

When you apply the [$group](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/group) stage to your window stage,
a single [group key](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/group)
has a limit of 100 megabytes of RAM.

Support for certain aggregation stages might be limited or unavailable
within windows. To learn more, see [aggregation pipeline stages](atlas-sp-aggregation-support).

In the event of a service interruption, you can resume the internal
pipeline of a window from its state at the point of interruption. To
learn more, see [checkpoints](atlas-sp-checkpoints).
